name: Critical paragraphs — HYGIENE_DELETE_PROOF.md
why_it_exists: The 'most important discovery' paragraphs in the audit reports carry disproportionate weight — surfacing them as an index makes them searchable.

hits.text:
| Path | Why Safe | Proof No Live Imports | Build Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src/components/orchestrator/Analysis/SyntheticLethality/sl_agent/` (43 files) | Python FastAPI backend accidentally committed into React frontend | `grep -r "sl_agent" src/ --include="*.jsx" --include="*.js"` returned zero results | None — Python files are never processed by Vite |
| `src/components/orchestrator/Analysis/SyntheticLethality/sl_patch/` (11 files) | Patch iteration of sl_agent, also Python | Same grep — zero JS/JSX references | None |
| `src/components/orchestrator/Analysis/SyntheticLethality/sl_patch_rs/` (7 files) | Replication-stress patch, Python | Same grep — zero references | None |
| `src/components/orchestrator/Analysis/SyntheticLethality/sl_patch_rs_2/` (7 files) | Second RS patch iteration, Python | Same grep — zero references | None |
| `src/components/research/__init__.py` | Python stub, not a JS module | grep returned zero references | None |
| `src/pages/ResearchPortal/__init__.py` | Python stub, not a JS module | grep returned zero references | None |
| `debug_raw_signals.py`, `test_paclitaxel_payload.py`, `verify_eligibility_adapter.py`, `verify_workflow_store.py` (root level) | Python test scripts, never imported | Not importable by Vite | None |
| `src/components/ayesha/DrugRankingPanel.jsx.backup` | Backup of DrugRankingPanel.jsx; live file at same path without `.backup` extension is unchanged | `grep -r ".backup" src/ --include="*.jsx"` returned zero references | None |
| `src/components/vus/EfficacyModal.jsx.backup` | Same pattern | Zero references | None |
| `
